subject: English
note: Achievement objectives from the New Zealand Curriculum. The refreshed NZC English (2023+) introduces new phase-based progressions; verify against nzcurriculum.tahurangi.education.govt.nz.

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Use sources of information and prior knowledge with developing confidence to make meaning from texts

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Recognise features of texts and relate these to their purposes

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Use an increasing understanding of the connections between oral and written language when creating texts

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Create texts for a range of purposes and audiences, using developing knowledge of text conventions

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Select and use sources of information and prior knowledge with some confidence to make sense of increasingly varied and complex texts

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Show some understanding of how to shape texts for different purposes and audiences

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Select, form, and express ideas on a range of topics

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Use an increasing knowledge of text conventions and language features to create a range of texts

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Integrate sources of information, processes, and strategies with developing confidence to identify, form, and express increasingly sophisticated ideas

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Show a developing understanding of how texts are constructed for different purposes and audiences and identify connections between texts

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Integrate sources of information, processes, and strategies purposefully when creating texts for a range of purposes and audiences

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Use language features appropriate to the audience and purpose, with developing control over writing conventions

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Integrate sources of information, processes, and strategies to identify and form ideas; analyse and evaluate texts for construction, purpose, and effect

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Show an understanding of how texts are shaped by purpose and audience, and identify and evaluate perspectives in texts

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Show a developed understanding of how to shape texts for different purposes and audiences; use a range of text structures, language features, and writing conventions accurately

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Use a range of language features and writing conventions to communicate ideas with increasing clarity and effect

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Identify and understand ideas and information across increasingly complex and varied texts; critically analyse texts for their construction, purpose, and intended effect

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Critically evaluate texts and identify perspectives and biases, considering the social, cultural, and historical context

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Create texts for specific purposes and audiences, using sophisticated text structures and language features with precision and deliberate effect

objectives.subject: English
objectives.text: Demonstrate control of language features and writing conventions, using them deliberately and perceptively to achieve effect
